headline: Trump SLAMS Afghan BORDER DOORS 🚪🔒 After Guard SHOOTOUT 💥🪖
text:
Afghan dude Rahmanullah Lakanwallah 🇦🇫🔫 – Biden's 2021 WELCOME WAGON 🚀🍆 SPECIAL – just AMBUSHED 🕵️‍♂️💨 two National Guard bros 🪖🩸 near White House lunch spot 🥪🏙️! Popped off at 2:15pm 📱💥 by Farragut Square 🚇, turning K Street into BLOOD BATH 🩸🍑 – soldiers CRIT GOATED 😩🩹 but OTHER GUARDS POUNCED 🦁👊 holding the Taliban simp DOWN till cops rolled up 🚔! Shooter got FOUR HOTS 🥵🔫 himself, now WIGGLING on pavement like bad kebab 🥙😵!

Trump 🍊👑 ROARING 'TERROR ATTACK 💣🕌 – BIDEN'S AFGHAN IMPORTS GONE WILD 🐺🇦🇫!' DHS labels him CRIMINAL ALIEN 👽🚫 who SLIPPED IN via Operation Allies Welcome 🤝🍆 (aka Biden's CHAOS EVAC 🌀✈️ post-Taliban takeover 🧔‍♂️🏰), got ASYLUM GREENLIGHT 📺✅ in 2024! Tens of THOUSANDS 🤑🇦🇫 flooded under Joe's FUMBLE WITHDRAWAL 🤦‍♂️💥 – Trump now REAMING EVERY SINGLE ONE: 'RE-EXAMINE or BOUNCE 👢🚀!'

USCIS FREEZES ALL AFGHAN PAPERWORK 🛑📜 pending VETTING GLOW-UP 🔍🧐 – no more Taliban-adjacent bros SLIDING IN 😏🚫! Pete Hegseth 🪖💪 (new SecDef DADDY) dropping 500 MORE GUARDS 🛡️📈 to make DC 'SAFE & GORGEOUS' ✨🏛️ – now 2,700 STRONG crushing 'OUTTA CONTROL' CRIME 📉🔥 that Trump TAMES like a boss 🐐!

Witnesses FREAKING 👻📹: Gunshots BANGING 😱🏃‍♂️‍➡️, peeps DIVING into shops 🏬🛡️, one dude FILMING soldiers BLEEDING in camo 🩸🪖 while shooter gets PATCHED like rejected Rambo 🩹🤡! Trump already BANNED Afghan TRAVEL ✈️🚫 +11 others, ENDED TPS DEPORT SHIELDS 🛡️❌ – SIV exceptions for US military homies 👨‍✈️🤝 spared, but NO MORE FREE PASSES post-Biden BUGOUT 🐛💨!

Wall Street? Nah, WALL STREET – Trump building that AFGHAN BARRIER 🧱🇺🇸 thicker than Hegseth's resolve 💪🍆! Biden's legacy? AFGHAN GUNMAN GOOF 😭🔫 – Trump's? DC SAFER THAN EVER, CRIME PLUMMETING 📉🚀 cuz GUARD DADDIES PATROLLING 👮‍♂️🛡️! Opponents WHINING about 'overreach' 🤡📜 but Trump like 'HOLD MY WALL 🧱🍑 – MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN 🇺🇸🔥!' Taliban watching from caves 🕳️😢 as Trump SLAYS the import game 🗡️💥!
